fact_nuggets.text: Tough Claws (Japanese: Tough Claws) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD Contact moves such as Take Down and Scratch become more powerful! MD RT DX Contact moves, such as Take Down and Scratch, become more powerful.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Affected moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Tough Claws boosts the power of the Pokemon's contact moves by approximately 30% (more precisely, a factor of 5325/4096). Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] The table below lists the moves affected by Tough Claws, as well as the Pokemon that can have Tough Claws and learn those moves. Move Type Cat. Psychic Physical 80 104 Although the following moves are affected by the Ability, they currently cannot be learned by any Pokemon with Tough Claws. They may, however, be used after a Pokemon with Tough Claws learned the move via Mimic , or be used by a Pokemon that gained Tough Claws by an Ability like Trace or Receiver or a move such as Skill Swap or Role Play . edit source ] Tough Claws has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Tough Claws boosts the power of the Pokemon's contact moves by approximately 30% (more precisely, a factor of 5325/4096).
